channel.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories
channel.description: Top stories in the U.S. and world news, politics, health, science, business, music, arts and culture. Nonprofit journalism with a mission. This is NPR.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

image.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories

item.title: Mystery bidder buys T. rex nicknamed 'Gus' for a record $50 million
item.description: A Tyrannosaurus rex fossil billed as one of the world's largest and most complete specimens was sold for a record $50.1 million Tuesday to a mystery bidder.
item.content:encoded:
A Tyrannosaurus rex fossil billed as one of the world's largest and most complete specimens was sold for a record $50.1 million Tuesday to a mystery bidder.

(Image credit: Matthew Sherman/Sotheby's via AP)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Trump will speak on elections in Thursday primetime address
item.description: The speech comes as President Trump has escalated calls for Republicans to pass tighter federal voting rules for November's midterm elections.
item.content:encoded:
The speech comes as President Trump has escalated calls for Republicans to pass tighter federal voting rules for November's midterm elections.

(Image credit: Julia Demaree Nikhinson)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Ebola is spreading faster in eastern Congo than it can be tracked, as deaths pass 700
item.description: Eighty percent of new Ebola cases in eastern Congo are emerging from unknown chains of transmission, according to WHO, a sign the outbreak is spreading faster than health officials can track.
item.content:encoded:
Eighty percent of new Ebola cases in eastern Congo are emerging from unknown chains of transmission, according to WHO, a sign the outbreak is spreading faster than health officials can track.

(Image credit: Dirole Lotsima Dieudonne)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Spain sparkles to shock France 2-0 and advance to the World Cup final
item.description: Spain is back in the men's World Cup final for the first time since 2010. That's also when Spain won its only World Cup title. France had hoped to reach the final for the third straight tournament.
item.content:encoded:
Spain is back in the men's World Cup final for the first time since 2010. That's also when Spain won its only World Cup title. France had hoped to reach the final for the third straight tournament.

(Image credit: Paul Ellis)
item.dc:creator: Russell Lewis

item.title: How do young people feel about AI? 7 teens weigh in
item.description: What's it like to grow up and learn in the age of AI? NPR put that question to seven teenagers across the country.
item.content:encoded: What's it like to grow up and learn in the age of AI? NPR put that question to seven teenagers across the country.
item.dc:creator: Lee V. Gaines

item.title: In the aftermath of deadly shootings, ICE pauses most traffic stops
item.description: U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement will pause non-urgent vehicle stops after two deadly shootings in less than a week, Maine U.S. Sen. Angus King's office tells NPR.
item.content:encoded:
U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement will pause non-urgent vehicle stops after two deadly shootings in less than a week, Maine U.S. Sen. Angus King's office tells NPR.

(Image credit: Joseph Prezioso)
item.dc:creator: Sergio Martínez-Beltrán

item.title: E. Jean Carroll receives $5.6 million from Trump in sexual abuse and defamation case
item.description: The payment comes three years after a jury found President Trump liable for sexually abusing and defaming the writer.
item.content:encoded:
The payment comes three years after a jury found President Trump liable for sexually abusing and defaming the writer.

(Image credit: Leonardo Munoz)
item.dc:creator: Bill Chappell

item.title: Environmental groups sue government to stop a big change to the Endangered Species Act
item.description: By altering the definition of the word "harm" as used by the Endangered Species Act, the Trump administration may limit how wildlife is protected in the United States. Environmental groups are suing.
item.content:encoded:
By altering the definition of the word "harm" as used by the Endangered Species Act, the Trump administration may limit how wildlife is protected in the United States. Environmental groups are suing.

(Image credit: Jared Lloyd)
item.dc:creator: Ari Daniel

item.title: Some international artists are skipping U.S. tours. Others may follow suit
item.description: The visa process for visiting artists has always been complicated and expensive. Under the current administration, it's gotten significantly worse.
item.content:encoded: The visa process for visiting artists has always been complicated and expensive. Under the current administration, it's gotten significantly worse.
item.dc:creator: Josie Fischels

item.title: Inflation slowed sharply -- but it may not last
item.description: Annual inflation hit 3.5% in June, down from May's more than three-year high — but the resumption of the conflict with Iran threaten to push up inflation as energy costs once again spike.
item.content:encoded:
Annual inflation hit 3.5% in June, down from May's more than three-year high — but the resumption of the conflict with Iran threaten to push up inflation as energy costs once again spike.

(Image credit: Brandon Bell)
item.dc:creator: Stephan Bisaha
